verification.notes: Live staging artifact matched the fixture-backed review artifact for fit-exhibitions; verified against data/staging/fit-exhibitions.live.json.

stagingNotes: Official Museum at FIT current and upcoming long-card sections only, and only cards with official exhibition detail links. Closure notices, lobby-only cards without official exhibition pages, past exhibitions, MFIT on the Road, and any detail-page enrichment remain out of scope for this first slice.
